channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Gill Urges Senate to Approve SAVE America Act
item.description: Representative Brandon Gill, a Texas Republican, stated on Newsmax that the Senate should now pass the SAVE America Act.

item.title: Maine Senate Race Poll Reveals Major Concerns for Graham Platner
Socialists Expand Efforts to Colorado, Aim to Challenge Democratic Establishment
item.description: The Democratic Socialists of America are focusing on Colorado primaries, backing Melat Kiros against Representative Diana DeGette in Denver's 1st Congressional District.

item.title: Court Overturns Freeze on Hudson Tunnel Funding
item.description: A judge on Monday lifted the Transportation Department's suspension of $16 billion in federal funds for the Hudson Tunnel Project, determining the freeze was unlawful.
